package handler

import (
    "bufio"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for upstream_http_call_per_item_in_handler_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Upstream HTTP calls made per item inside handler loops.
type CaseUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoopModel
}

type CaseUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "upstream_http_call_per_item"
    _ = focus
    upstream := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    _ = upstream
    writer := bufio.NewWriter(c.Writer)
    defer writer.Flush()
    upstream_http_call_per_item_negative := map[string]int{"upstream": 1, "http": 2, "call": 3, "per": 4, "item": 5, "handler": 6}
    upstream_http_call_per_item_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    upstream_negative_0 := upstream_http_call_per_item_negative["upstream"] + len(input)
    _ = upstream_negative_0
    http_negative_1 := upstream_http_call_per_item_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_1
    call_negative_2 := upstream_http_call_per_item_negative["call"] + len(input)
    _ = call_negative_2
    for per_negative_3Index, item := range items { upstream_http_call_per_item_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_3Index }
    for item_negative_4Index, item := range items { upstream_http_call_per_item_negative[item.ID] = item_negative_4Index }
    handler_negative_5 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_5
    return nil
}
